roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL:TO SET REVOCATION OF POST RELEASE COMMUNITY SUPERVISION/X: MOTION TOREVOKE POST RELEASE COMMUNITY SUPERVISION BY THE ADULT PROBATION DEPARTMENT: THE COURT HAS READ AND CONSIDERED THE PETITION FOR REVOCATION OF COMMUNITY SUPERVISION,/DEFT ADV/DEF: IS ADVISED AND ADMITS THE VIOLATION OF HIS POST RELEASE COMMUNITY SUPERVISION/CTORD: POST RELEASE COMMUNITY SUPERVISION REINSTATED/CJ:120 DAYS/CTS:11/4019HALF/DEF: SHALL ENGAGE IN TREATMENT AS DEEMED APPROPRIATE BY THE ADULT PROBATION/DEF: SHALL REPORT TO THE ADULTPROBATION UPON HIS RELEASE FROM CUSTODY/
/CAL:APD 3455PC MOTION/WIAMTR/X:PRCS ADMINISTRATIVELY REVOKED,/NB/SHER//CONTD:TO SET APD 3455PC HEARING/DOP/
